mapper.select:
select d.proc_id , count(*) as CNT, '' as CNM from NIC66B E, WF_PROC_INSTANCE a, WF_PROC_INSTANCE d, WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT b left outer join wf_work_performer c on ( c.WORK_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' and b.work_id=c.work_id and b.PARTICIPANT_ID=c.PERFORMER_ID) where a.WORK_ID=b.WORK_ID and c.PERFORMER_ID is null and ((b.PERSON_YN='Y' AND b.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (b.PERSON_YN='N' AND b.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA, C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID}) ) ) and a.PAR_INST_ID=d.INST_ID and e.INST_ID=d.INST_ID group by d.proc_id
UNION ALL SELECT 77777, COUNT(*) AS CNT, '' FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,(SELECT J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC73B J GROUP BY J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ) C WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.INST_ID IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 77777, COUNT(*) AS CNT, '' FROM SSQ.NIC66B A ,SSQ.NIC01B B ,(SELECT J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC73B J GROUP BY J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ) C , ( SELECT SUBSTR(JOB_DT,1,8) AS JOB_DT , JOB_ST_CD FROM SSQ.NIC93B_LOG WHERE JOB_DT IN ( select MAX(JOB_DT) from SSQ.nic93b_log I where job_id in ( 'B70001' , 'B70002') AND SUBSTR(JOB_DT,1,8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) ) D WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.INST_ID IS NULL AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.JOB_DT AND D.JOB_ST_CD IN ('1','9') UNION ALL SELECT 99999, COUNT(*) AS CNT, '' FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND OK_CCD = '1' --AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3), 'yyyymmdd') and to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') UNION ALL SELECT 88888, COUNT(*) AS CNT, '' FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND OK_CCD = '1' --AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3), 'yyyymmdd') and to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 10000 + DECODE(COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD), '99', '10', COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ) , COUNT(*) AS CNT , GET_CODE_NAME('S060', COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD)) FROM NIC66B A, NIC80B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND LENGTH(B.RPR_OGN_CD) = 6 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) IN ('14','24','34','44','54','60','99') AND OK_CCD = '1' --AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3), 'yyyymmdd') and to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ORDER BY DECODE(COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD), '99', '10', COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 20000 + DECODE(NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD), '99', '10', NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ) , COUNT(*) AS CNT , GET_CODE_NAME('S060', NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD)) FROM NIC66B A, NIC80B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND LENGTH(B.RPR_OGN_CD) = 6 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) IN ('14','24','34','54','99') AND OK_CCD = '1' --AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3), 'yyyymmdd') and to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ORDER BY DECODE(NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD), '99', '10', NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT 30000 + 70 , COUNT(*) AS CNT , GET_CODE_NAME('S063', '70') FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND SSPS_PRGRS_CCD = '70' --AND REQ_DT BETWEEN to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3), 'yyyymmdd') and to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
UNION ALL
SELECT 11 AS PROC_ID --위험요소결재 , COUNT(DISTINCT M.BAS_YYMM) AS CNT , '위험요소결재' AS CNM FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M M , SRBA_APPR_M G WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = G.BAS_YYMM AND 'SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M' = G.TABLE_NM AND ( ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND #{ROLE_CD} = '104' ) OR ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND #{ROLE_CD} = '4' ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT 12 AS PROC_ID --통제항목결재 , COUNT(DISTINCT M.BAS_YYMM) AS CNT , '통제항목결재' AS CNM FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M M , SRBA_APPR_M G WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = G.BAS_YYMM AND 'SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M' = G.TABLE_NM AND ( ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND #{ROLE_CD} = '104' ) OR ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND #{ROLE_CD} = '4' ) )
UNION ALL
--통제수행 결재건수 SELECT 13 AS PROC_ID , COUNT(1) AS CNT , '' as CNM FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM , M.BRNO, M.CNTL_ELMN_C, G.GYLJ_S_C FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M M , SRBA_APPR_M G WHERE 1 =1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = G.BAS_YYMM AND 'SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M' = G.TABLE_NM AND M.CNTL_ELMN_C = G.LV3 AND M.BRNO = G.BRNO GROUP BY M.BAS_YYMM , M.BRNO, M.CNTL_ELMN_C, G.GYLJ_S_C ) A , ( SELECT DEP_DESC AS BRNO FROM C_DEP_INFO AA, C_USER UU WHERE UU.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND UU.DEP_ID = AA.DEP_ID ) B WHERE ( #{ROLE_CD} = '4' AND GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --운영팀담당자 ( 반려대상 ) OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '4' AND GYLJ_S_C = '23' ) --운영팀담당자 ( 영업점대상 본점담당자 결재 대상 ) OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '104' AND GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --보고책임자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '104' AND GYLJ_S_C = '32' ) --보고책임자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '105' AND GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --지점담당자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '6' AND GYLJ_S_C ='13' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO) --지점책임자
UNION ALL
--개선현황 결재건수 SELECT 20 AS PROC_ID , COUNT(1) AS CNT , '' as CNM FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM , M.BRNO, M.LV3, G.GYLJ_S_C FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I M , SRBA_APPR_M G WHERE 1 =1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = G.BAS_YYMM AND 'SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I' = G.TABLE_NM AND M.LV3 = G.LV3 AND M.BRNO = G.BRNO GROUP BY M.BAS_YYMM , M.BRNO, M.LV3, G.GYLJ_S_C ) A , ( SELECT DEP_DESC AS BRNO FROM C_DEP_INFO AA, C_USER UU WHERE UU.USER_ID = '0' AND UU.DEP_ID = AA.DEP_ID ) B WHERE ( #{ROLE_CD} = '4' AND GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --운영팀담당자 ( 반려대상 ) OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '4' AND GYLJ_S_C = '23' ) --운영팀담당자 ( 영업점대상 본점담당자 결재 대상 ) OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '104' AND GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --보고책임자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '104' AND GYLJ_S_C = '32' ) --보고책임자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '105' AND GYLJ_S_C = '220' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO ) --지점담당자 OR ( #{ROLE_CD} = '6' AND GYLJ_S_C ='13' AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO) --지점책임자
UNION ALL
-- KRI 개선 SELECT 21 AS PROC_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT M.GYLJ_ID) AS CNT , 'KRI개선' AS CNM FROM JRBA_RPT_RST_M M , C_GYLJ_H G WHERE 1=1 AND M.GYLJ_ID = G.GYLJ_ID AND G.GYLJ_G_C = 'KR04' AND ( (G.GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_CD} ) OR ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_CD} ) )
UNION ALL
-- KoFIU 제도이행평가 SELECT 22 AS PROC_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT M.GYLJ_ID) AS CNT , '제도이행평가' AS CNM FROM JRBA_RPT_RST_M M , C_GYLJ_H G WHERE 1=1 AND M.GYLJ_ID = G.GYLJ_ID AND G.GYLJ_G_C = 'W99' AND ( (G.GYLJ_S_C = '12' AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_CD} ) OR ( G.GYLJ_S_C = '22' AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_CD} ) )

SELECT /*+ LEADING(E) */ D.PROC_ID, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B E, WF_PROC_INSTANCE A, WF_PROC_INSTANCE D, WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B LEFT OUTER JOIN WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON ( C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND B.WORK_ID = C.WORK_ID AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID = C.PERFORMER_ID) WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND ( (B.PERSON_YN ='Y' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT J.DEP_ID || '.' || I.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE I, C_USER J WHERE I.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND I.USER_ID = J.USER_ID AND J.DEP_ID || '.' || I.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} ) ) ) AND A.PAR_INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID GROUP BY D.PROC_ID
UNION ALL SELECT 99999, COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B F WHERE F.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND F.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND F.OK_CCD = '1' AND F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') UNION ALL SELECT 88888, COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B G WHERE G.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND G.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND G.OK_CCD = '1' AND G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL SELECT 77777, COUNT(*) FROM NIC93B_LOG I WHERE 1=1 AND I.JOB_ID IN ('A30S10','A50S10') -- 사이트에 맞게 JOB_ID변경 AND I.JOB_ST_CD = '9' AND I.TRADE_DT IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT J.JOB_DT FROM NIC93B_LOG J WHERE 1=1 AND J.JOB_ID IN ('A30S10','A50S10') -- 사이트에 맞게 JOB_ID변경 AND J.JOB_ST_CD = 1 AND I.TRADE_DT = J.TRADE_DT AND J.JOB_DT = ( SELECT MAX(K.JOB_DT) FROM NIC93B_LOG K WHERE SUBSTR(J.JOB_DT, 1, 8)= SUBSTR(K.JOB_DT, 1, 8) AND J.JOB_SEQ = K.JOB_SEQ GROUP BY SUBSTR(K.JOB_DT, 1, 8) ) )
SELECT A.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ FROM NIC17B A WHERE A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD = #{param0} AND A.CIF = #{param1} AND ROWNUM=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 혐의거래 생성일자 ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD -- 혐의거래생성 구분코드 ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD -- 혐의유형코드 ,A.SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD -- 혐의거래보고구분코드 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD -- 혐의거래부점코드 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_NM -- 혐의거래부점코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', C.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO -- 거래자실명확인번호 ,C.CS_NM -- 거래자실명확인번호명 ,DECODE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, 'CTR', B.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC66B A, NIC71B B, NIC01B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ = C.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD} AND B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) M WHERE ROWNUM < #{ROWNUM}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 혐의거래 생성 일자 ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD -- 혐의거래생성 구분코드 ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD -- 혐의유형코드 ,A.SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD -- 혐의거래보고구분코드 ,( SELECT I.GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC71B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS GNL_AC_NO -- 종합계좌번호 ,( SELECT J.MN_DL_DPRT_CD FROM NIC71B J WHERE J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD -- 주거래부점코드 ,( SELECT K.MN_DL_DPRT_NM FROM NIC71B K WHERE K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM -- 주거래부점코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', B.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO ,B.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ ,B.CS_NM FROM NIC66B A, NIC01B B WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ = B.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD} ) T WHERE ROWNUM < #{ROWNUM}

WITH RECURSIVE (PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, MENU_ACT_ID, DISPLAY_NM, ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE, INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE, DISPLAY_ORDER, WINDOW_ACT_ID, RECURSIVE_LEVEL) AS ( SELECT X.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,X.MENU_ACT_ID ,X.DISPLAY_NM ,X.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,X.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,X.DISPLAY_ORDER ,X.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,1 RECURSIVE_LEVEL FROM ( SELECT C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,B.MENU_ACT_ID ,A.DISPLAY_NM ,B.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,B.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,C.DISPLAY_ORDER ,( SELECT E.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM ( SELECT F.MENU_ACT_ID ,F.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP F ORDER BY F.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN DESC ,F.WINDOW_ACT_ID ASC ) E WHERE ROWNUM = 1 AND E.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID ) AS WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH D ,C_PKG_MENU_MAP C ,C_MENU_ACT B ,C_MENU_DISPLAY A WHERE A.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID AND B.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID AND B.MENU_DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' AND C.PKG_ID = D.PKG_ID AND C.MENU_ACT_ID <> C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND D.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND D.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND D.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID AND D.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND D.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND D.ACCESS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.DISPLAY_ORDER ) X WHERE X.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = 'AML' UNION ALL SELECT Y.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,Y.MENU_ACT_ID ,Y.DISPLAY_NM ,Y.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,Y.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,Y.DISPLAY_ORDER ,Y.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,P.RECURSIVE_LEVEL+1 FROM ( SELECT C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,B.MENU_ACT_ID ,A.DISPLAY_NM ,B.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,B.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,C.DISPLAY_ORDER ,( SELECT E.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM ( SELECT F.MENU_ACT_ID ,F.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP F ORDER BY F.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN DESC ,F.WINDOW_ACT_ID ASC ) E WHERE ROWNUM = 1 AND E.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID ) AS WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH D ,C_PKG_MENU_MAP C ,C_MENU_ACT B ,C_MENU_DISPLAY A WHERE A.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID AND B.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID AND B.MENU_DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' AND C.PKG_ID = D.PKG_ID AND C.MENU_ACT_ID <> C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND D.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND D.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND D.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID AND D.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND D.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND D.ACCESS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.DISPLAY_ORDER ) Y, RECURSIVE P WHERE Y.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = P.MENU_ACT_ID ) SELECT R.RECURSIVE_LEVEL AS M_LEVEL ,CASE WHEN R.WINDOW_ACT_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS IS_LEAF ,R.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,R.MENU_ACT_ID ,R.DISPLAY_NM ,R.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,R.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,R.DISPLAY_ORDER ,R.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM RECURSIVE R ORDER BY R.RECURSIVE_LEVEL, R.DISPLAY_ORDER
SELECT A.USER_ID ,A.DETAIL_CD ,A.DETAIL FROM C_USER_DETAIL A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND A.DETAIL_CD = 'PWD_CHNG_DATE' AND A.DETAIL IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_USER_DETAIL (USER_ID, DETAIL_CD, DETAIL) VALUES ( #{USER_ID}, 'PWD_CHNG_DATE', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') )
mapper.update: UPDATE C_USER_DETAIL A SET A.DETAIL = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') WHERE A.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND A.DETAIL_CD = 'PWD_CHNG_DATE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_USER_PASSWD_HST (USER_ID, USER_PWD, CRE_ID, CRE_DT) VALUES (#{USER_ID}, #{USER_PWD}, #{CRE_ID}, #{CRE_DT})
mapper.select: /* 위험등급별 고객 현황: 전체, 최근 1개월 */ WITH TOTAL_HML_DATA AS ( SELECT H, M , (CASE WHEN T = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (1 - (H + M)) END) AS L FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(T_CNT), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(SUM(H_CNT), 0)/SUM(T_CNT)) END, 3) AS H , TRUNC(CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(T_CNT), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(SUM(M_CNT), 0)/SUM(T_CNT)) END, 3) AS M , NVL(SUM(T_CNT), 0) AS T FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT , NIC65.CNT AS T_CNT FROM (SELECT /*+ INDEX_SS(X NIC65BPK) */ MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B WHERE 1 = 1 AND BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND DATA_CCD = '11') NIC65_MTH LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B NIC65 ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_MTH.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND NIC65.DATA_CCD = '11' AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })))))) SELECT 'L' AS TS_GRADE_CCD , '저위험' AS TS_GRADE_NAME , L AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA UNION ALL SELECT 'M' AS TS_GRADE_CCD , '중위험' AS TS_GRADE_NAME , M AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA UNION ALL SELECT 'H' AS TS_GRADE_CCD , '고위험' AS TS_GRADE_NAME , H AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA

/* 위험등급별 고객 현황: 개인/법인, 최근 1개월 */ SELECT CUST_CCD AS TS_CUST_CCD , CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = '01' THEN '개인' ELSE '법인' END AS TS_CUST_CCD_NM , NVL(SUM(H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H , NVL(SUM(M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M , NVL(SUM(L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT NIC65.CUST_CCD , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM (SELECT /*+ INDEX_SS(X NIC65BPK) */ MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B WHERE 1 = 1 AND BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND DATA_CCD = '11') NIC65_MTH , NIC65B NIC65 WHERE 1 = 1 AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_MTH.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND NIC65.DATA_CCD = '11' AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })) UNION ALL SELECT '01' AS CUST_CCD, 0 AS H_CNT, 0 AS M_CNT, 0 AS L_CNT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '02' AS CUST_CCD, 0 AS H_CNT, 0 AS M_CNT, 0 AS L_CNT FROM DUAL) GROUP BY CUST_CCD

/* 월별 고객확인(CDD) 현황: 2개월, 신규 */ WITH MNTH_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(NIC65_01.BAS_YYMM,-NIC65_02.LV+1),'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_SS(X NIC65BPK) */ NVL(TO_DATE(MAX(BAS_YYMM),'YYYYMM'),SYSDATE) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B WHERE 1 = 1 AND BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03') NIC65_01 , ( SELECT LEVEL AS LV FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 2) NIC65_02) SELECT BAS_YYMM AS TS_BAS_YYMM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BAS_YYMM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YY.MM')||'월' AS TS_BAS_YYMM_NAME , NVL(SUM(H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H , NVL(SUM(M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M , NVL(SUM(L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT MD.BAS_YYMM , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM MNTH_DATA MD LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B NIC65 ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = MD.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '01' AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })))) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ORDER BY BAS_YYMM

/* 월별 고객확인(CDD) 현황: 2개월, 재이행 */ WITH MNTH_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(NIC65_01.BAS_YYMM,-NIC65_02.LV+1),'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_SS(X NIC65BPK) */ NVL(TO_DATE(MAX(BAS_YYMM),'YYYYMM'),SYSDATE) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B WHERE 1 = 1 AND BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03') NIC65_01 , ( SELECT LEVEL AS LV FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 2) NIC65_02) SELECT BAS_YYMM AS TS_BAS_YYMM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BAS_YYMM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YY.MM')||'월' AS TS_BAS_YYMM_NAME , NVL(SUM(H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H , NVL(SUM(M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M , NVL(SUM(L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT MD.BAS_YYMM , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT , CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM MNTH_DATA MD LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B NIC65 ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = MD.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '02' AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })))) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ORDER BY BAS_YYMM

/* 일별 고액현금거래(CTR) 현황: 5일 */ WITH BAS_YMD_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGT_DATE AS BAS_YMD FROM ( SELECT B.DL_DT AS TAGT_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.DL_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.DL_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY B.DL_DT ORDER BY B.DL_DT DESC ) WHERE RNUM <= 5) SELECT X.BAS_YMD AS TS_BAS_YMD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.BAS_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM.DD') || (SELECT CASE WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '0' THEN '(일)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '1' THEN '(월)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '2' THEN '(화)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '3' THEN '(수)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '4' THEN '(목)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '5' THEN '(금)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '6' THEN '(토)' END FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR I WHERE I.ENTY_ID = 1 AND I.TAGT_DATE = X.BAS_YMD) AS TS_BAS_YMD_NAME , NVL(Y.TI_ALT_CNT,0) AS TI_ALT_CNT , NVL(Y.TI_RPT_CNT,0) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM BAS_YMD_LIST X , ( SELECT B.DL_DT AS BAS_YMD , COUNT(*) AS TI_ALT_CNT , COUNT(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1)) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT >= (SELECT MIN(BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND ( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })) GROUP BY B.DL_DT ) Y WHERE X.BAS_YMD = Y.BAS_YMD(+) ORDER BY X.BAS_YMD

/* 일별 의심스러운거래(STR) 현황: 영업일 5일 */ WITH BAS_YMD_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGT_DATE AS BAS_YMD FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(X X1_IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR) */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')+1,'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TAGT_DATE DESC) AS RNUM FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR X WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 -- 삼성증권 AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')+1,'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND HDAY_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TAGT_DATE DESC ) WHERE RNUM <= 5) SELECT X.BAS_YMD AS TS_BAS_YMD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.BAS_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM.DD') || (SELECT CASE WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '0' THEN '(일)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '1' THEN '(월)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '2' THEN '(화)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '3' THEN '(수)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '4' THEN '(목)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '5' THEN '(금)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '6' THEN '(토)' END FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR I WHERE I.ENTY_ID = 1 AND I.TAGT_DATE = X.BAS_YMD) AS TS_BAS_YMD_NAME , NVL(Y.TI_ALT_CNT,0) AS TI_ALT_CNT , NVL(Y.TI_RPT_CNT,0) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM BAS_YMD_LIST X , ( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BAS_YMD , COUNT(*) AS TI_ALT_CNT , COUNT(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1)) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MAX(HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY DL_DT DESC, DL_SQ DESC) MAX_BRN_CD FROM SSQ.NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= (SELECT MIN(BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST) AND (SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) -- 2022.01.04 STR WC07 거래번호 문제로 OUTER로 변경 AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID(+) -- 2022.01.04 STR WC07 거래번호 문제로 OUTER로 변경 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= (SELECT MIN(BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND ( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND B.MAX_BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })) GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) Y WHERE X.BAS_YMD = Y.BAS_YMD(+) ORDER BY X.BAS_YMD

/* 위험등급별 고객 현황: 전체, 최근 1개월 * 중위험, 고위험의 잔여비율은 모두 저위험에 포함됨 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 지점이 전체(99999)인 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ WITH TOTAL_HML_DATA AS ( SELECT J.H, J.M, (CASE WHEN J.T = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (1 - (J.H + J.M) ) END) AS L FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(I.T_CNT), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(SUM(I.H_CNT), 0)/SUM(I.T_CNT)) END, 3) AS H ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(I.T_CNT), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(SUM(I.M_CNT), 0)/SUM(I.T_CNT)) END, 3) AS M ,NVL(SUM(I.T_CNT), 0) AS T FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN Z.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN Z.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT ,CASE WHEN Z.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN Z.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT ,Z.CNT AS T_CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(X PK_NIC65B) */ MAX(X.BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND X.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND X.DATA_CCD = '11' ) Y LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B Z ON ( Z.BAS_YYMM = Y.BAS_YYMM AND Z.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND Z.DATA_CCD = '11' AND ( (#{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7') AND Z.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID} NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND Z.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) ) ) I ) J ) SELECT 'L' AS TS_GRADE_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'L') AS TS_GRADE_NAME ,A.L AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA A UNION ALL SELECT 'M' AS TS_GRADE_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'M') AS TS_GRADE_NAME ,B.M AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA B UNION ALL SELECT 'H' AS TS_GRADE_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'H') AS TS_GRADE_NAME ,C.H AS TD_GRADE_PERCENT FROM TOTAL_HML_DATA C

/* 위험등급별 고객 현황: 개인/법인, 최근 1개월 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 지점이 전체(99999)인 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ SELECT A.CUST_CCD AS TS_CUST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', SUBSTR(A.CUST_CCD,2,1)) AS TS_CUST_CCD_NM ,NVL(SUM(A.H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H ,NVL(SUM(A.M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M ,NVL(SUM(A.L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT Z.CUST_CCD ,CASE WHEN Z.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN Z.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT ,CASE WHEN Z.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN Z.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT ,CASE WHEN Z.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN Z.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(X PK_NIC65B) */ MAX(X.BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND X.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND X.DATA_CCD = '11' ) Y ,NIC65B Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.BAS_YYMM = Y.BAS_YYMM AND Z.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND Z.DATA_CCD = '11' AND ( (#{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7') AND Z.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID} NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND Z.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) UNION ALL SELECT '01' AS CUST_CCD, 0 AS H_CNT, 0 AS M_CNT, 0 AS L_CNT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '02' AS CUST_CCD, 0 AS H_CNT, 0 AS M_CNT, 0 AS L_CNT FROM DUAL ) A GROUP BY A.CUST_CCD

/* 월별 고객확인(CDD) 현황: 2개월, 신규 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 지점이 전체(99999)인 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ WITH MNTH_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(Y.BAS_YYMM, -Z.LV+1),'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(X PK_NIC65B) */ NVL(TO_DATE(MAX(X.BAS_YYMM),'YYYYMM'), SYSDATE) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND X.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' ) Y , ( SELECT LEVEL AS LV FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 2 ) Z ) SELECT C.BAS_YYMM AS TS_BAS_YYMM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.BAS_YYMM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YY.MM') AS TS_BAS_YYMM_NAME ,NVL(SUM(C.H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H ,NVL(SUM(C.M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M ,NVL(SUM(C.L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM MNTH_DATA A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B B ON ( B.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND B.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND B.DATA_TEX_CCD = '01' AND ( ( #{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7') AND B.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND B.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) ) ) C GROUP BY C.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY C.BAS_YYMM

/* 월별 고객확인(CDD) 현황: 2개월, 재이행 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 지점이 전체(99999)인 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ WITH MNTH_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(Y.BAS_YYMM, -Z.LV+1), 'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(X PK_NIC65B) */ NVL(TO_DATE(MAX(X.BAS_YYMM),'YYYYMM'), SYSDATE) AS BAS_YYMM FROM NIC65B X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.BAS_YYMM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND X.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' ) Y ,( SELECT LEVEL AS LV FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 2) Z ) SELECT C.BAS_YYMM AS TS_BAS_YYMM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.BAS_YYMM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YY.MM') AS TS_BAS_YYMM_NAME ,NVL(SUM(C.H_CNT), 0) AS TD_H ,NVL(SUM(C.M_CNT), 0) AS TD_M ,NVL(SUM(C.L_CNT), 0) AS TD_L FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS H_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS M_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '03' THEN B.CNT ELSE 0 END AS L_CNT FROM MNTH_DATA A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B B ON ( B.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND B.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND B.DATA_TEX_CCD = '02' AND ( ( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7') AND B.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND B.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) ) ) C GROUP BY C.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY C.BAS_YYMM

/* 일별 고액현금거래(CTR) 현황: 거래일 5일 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 모든 지점 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ WITH BAS_YMD_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGT_DATE AS BAS_YMD FROM ( SELECT B.DL_DT AS TAGT_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.DL_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.DL_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY B.DL_DT ORDER BY B.DL_DT DESC ) WHERE RNUM <= 5) SELECT X.BAS_YMD AS TS_BAS_YMD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.BAS_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM.DD') || (SELECT CASE WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '0' THEN '(일)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '1' THEN '(월)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '2' THEN '(화)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '3' THEN '(수)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '4' THEN '(목)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '5' THEN '(금)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '6' THEN '(토)' END FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR I WHERE I.ENTY_ID = 1 AND I.TAGT_DATE = X.BAS_YMD) AS TS_BAS_YMD_NAME ,NVL(Y.TI_ALT_CNT,0) AS TI_ALT_CNT ,NVL(Y.TI_RPT_CNT,0) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM BAS_YMD_LIST X ,( SELECT B.DL_DT AS BAS_YMD ,COUNT(*) AS TI_ALT_CNT ,COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' THEN 1 WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND A.OK_CCD = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT >= (SELECT MIN(T.BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST T) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND ( #{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) GROUP BY B.DL_DT ) Y WHERE X.BAS_YMD = Y.BAS_YMD(+) ORDER BY X.BAS_YMD

/* 일별 의심스러운거래(STR) 현황: 추출일 5일 * 직문에 따라 다르게 조회함 * 본점담당자(4), 본점책임자(5), AML시스템관리자(7) : 모든 지점 자료를 조회 * 다른 직무: 사용자의 지점에 해당하는 자료를 조회 */ WITH BAS_YMD_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGT_DATE AS BAS_YMD FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(X X1_IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR) */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')+1,'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TAGT_DATE DESC) AS RNUM FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR X WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 -- 삼성증권 AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')+1,'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND HDAY_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TAGT_DATE DESC ) WHERE RNUM <= 5) SELECT X.BAS_YMD AS TS_BAS_YMD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.BAS_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM.DD') || (SELECT CASE WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '0' THEN '(일)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '1' THEN '(월)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '2' THEN '(화)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '3' THEN '(수)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '4' THEN '(목)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '5' THEN '(금)' WHEN DAY_OF_WEEK_CODE = '6' THEN '(토)' END FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR I WHERE I.ENTY_ID = 1 AND I.TAGT_DATE = X.BAS_YMD) AS TS_BAS_YMD_NAME ,NVL(Y.TI_ALT_CNT,0) AS TI_ALT_CNT ,NVL(Y.TI_RPT_CNT,0) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM BAS_YMD_LIST X ,( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BAS_YMD ,COUNT(*) AS TI_ALT_CNT ,COUNT(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1) ) AS TI_RPT_CNT FROM NIC66B A ,(SELECT M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,M.SSPS_DL_ID ,MAX(M.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY M.DL_DT DESC, M.DL_SQ DESC) AS MAX_BRN_CD FROM NIC75B M WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= (SELECT MIN(N.BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST N) AND (M.SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR M.SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, M.SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= (SELECT MIN(P.BAS_YMD) FROM BAS_YMD_LIST P) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND ( #{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') OR ( #{ROLE_ID} NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND B.MAX_BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD}) ) GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) Y WHERE X.BAS_YMD = Y.BAS_YMD(+) ORDER BY X.BAS_YMD

SELECT S.DT ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN S.JOB_ID = 'A10R10' THEN S.LAST_STAUS ELSE NULL END) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY 1) AS W ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN S.JOB_ID = 'A10R20' THEN S.LAST_STAUS ELSE NULL END) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY 1) AS R ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN S.JOB_ID = 'A30S10' THEN S.LAST_STAUS ELSE NULL END) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY 1) AS S ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN S.JOB_ID = 'A50S10' THEN S.LAST_STAUS ELSE NULL END) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY 1) AS C FROM ( SELECT A.DT ,B.JOB_ID ,B.JOB_ST_CD ,B.LAST_STAUS FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM DUAL UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM DUAL UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 2, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM DUAL ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.* ,CASE WHEN T.JOB_ST_CD = 1 THEN 'A' WHEN T.JOB_ST_CD = 9 THEN 'E' WHEN T.JOB_ST_CD IS NULL THEN 'O' END AS LAST_STAUS FROM ( SELECT C.JOB_ID ,TO_CHAR(C.STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT ,C.JOB_ST_CD ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C.JOB_ID, TO_CHAR(C.STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY C.STRT_DY_TM DESC) AS RM FROM NIC93B_LOG C WHERE C.STRT_DY_TM BETWEEN TO_DATE((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 2, 'YYYYMMDD') || '000000'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND C.JOB_ID IN ( 'A10R10','A10R20','A30S10','A50S10') ) T WHERE T.RM = 1 ) B ON A.DT = B.DT ) S GROUP BY S.DT ORDER BY S.DT DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(D.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN D.BAS_YYMM WHEN SUBSTR(D.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) IN ('2', '3') OR D.BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE 'Total' END AS BAS_YYMM ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(D.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '01' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'H') WHEN SUBSTR(D.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '02' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'M') WHEN SUBSTR(D.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '03' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'L') ELSE CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE 'Total' END END AS DATA_DTIL_NM ,D.T_PERS_CNT ,D.T_PERS_RAT ,D.P_PERS_CNT ,D.P_PERS_RAT ,D.C_PERS_CNT ,D.C_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT C.BAS_YYMM ,C.DATA_DTIL_CCD ,SUM(C.T_PERS_CNT) AS T_PERS_CNT ,SUM(C.T_PERS_RAT) AS T_PERS_RAT ,SUM(C.P_PERS_CNT) AS P_PERS_CNT ,SUM(C.P_PERS_RAT) AS P_PERS_RAT ,SUM(C.C_PERS_CNT) AS C_PERS_CNT ,SUM(C.C_PERS_RAT) AS C_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT B.BAS_YYMM ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY B.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY B.DATA_DTIL_CCD) || B.DATA_DTIL_CCD AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 전체 */ ,B.TP_CNT AS T_PERS_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' OR B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.TT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.TP_CNT/B.TT_CNT) END, 3) ELSE 1 - ( TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.TT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.TH_CNT/B.TT_CNT) END, 3) + TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.TT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.TM_CNT/B.TT_CNT) END, 3) ) END AS T_PERS_RAT /* 개인 */ ,B.PP_CNT AS P_PERS_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' OR B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.PT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.PP_CNT/B.PT_CNT) END, 3) ELSE 1 - ( TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.PT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.PH_CNT/B.PT_CNT) END, 3) + TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.PT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.PM_CNT/B.PT_CNT) END, 3) ) END AS P_PERS_RAT
/* 법인 */ ,B.CP_CNT AS C_PERS_CNT ,CASE WHEN B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' OR B.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.CT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.CP_CNT/B.CT_CNT) END, 3) ELSE 1 - ( TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.CT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.CH_CNT/B.CT_CNT) END, 3) + TRUNC(CASE WHEN B.CT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (B.CM_CNT/B.CT_CNT) END, 3) ) END AS C_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 전체 */ ,SUM(SUM(A.CNT)) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS TT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(A.CNT), 0) AS TP_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS TH_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS TM_CNT /* 개인 */ ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS PT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PP_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '01' AND A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS PH_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '01' AND A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS PM_CNT /* 법인 */ ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS CT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CP_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '02' AND A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS CH_CNT ,SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN A.CUST_CCD = '02' AND A.DATA_DTIL_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) ) OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM) AS CM_CNT FROM NIC65B A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BAS_YYMM >= #{fromDate } AND A.BAS_YYMM <= #{toDate } AND A.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND A.DATA_CCD = '11' AND ( (#{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7') AND A.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND A.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM ,A.DATA_DTIL_CCD ) B ) C WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY C.BAS_YYMM, ROLLUP(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD) ORDER BY C.BAS_YYMM DESC, C.DATA_DTIL_CCD ) D

SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN BAS_YYMM WHEN SUBSTR(DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) IN ('2', '3') OR BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE '합계' END AS BAS_YYMM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '01' THEN '고위험' WHEN SUBSTR(DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '02' THEN '중위험' WHEN SUBSTR(DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '03' THEN '저위험' ELSE CASE WHEN BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '계' END END AS DATA_DTIL_NM , TN_PERS_CNT , TR_PERS_CNT , TD_PERS_CNT , TF_PERS_CNT , PN_PERS_CNT , PR_PERS_CNT , PD_PERS_CNT , PF_PERS_CNT , CN_PERS_CNT , CR_PERS_CNT , CD_PERS_CNT , CF_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM , DATA_DTIL_CCD , SUM(TN_PERS_CNT) AS TN_PERS_CNT , SUM(TR_PERS_CNT) AS TR_PERS_CNT , SUM(TD_PERS_CNT) AS TD_PERS_CNT , SUM(TF_PERS_CNT) AS TF_PERS_CNT , SUM(PN_PERS_CNT) AS PN_PERS_CNT , SUM(PR_PERS_CNT) AS PR_PERS_CNT , SUM(PD_PERS_CNT) AS PD_PERS_CNT , SUM(PF_PERS_CNT) AS PF_PERS_CNT , SUM(CN_PERS_CNT) AS CN_PERS_CNT , SUM(CR_PERS_CNT) AS CR_PERS_CNT , SUM(CD_PERS_CNT) AS CD_PERS_CNT , SUM(CF_PERS_CNT) AS CF_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT NIC65.BAS_YYMM , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY NIC65.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD) || NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 전체 */ /* 신규 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '03' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '04' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TF_PERS_CNT /* 개인 */ /* 신규 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '01' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '02' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '03' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '04' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PF_PERS_CNT /* 법인 */ /* 신규 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '01' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '02' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '03' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '04' AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CF_PERS_CNT FROM NIC65B NIC65 WHERE 1 = 1 AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM >= #{fromDate } AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM <= #{toDate } AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })) GROUP BY NIC65.BAS_YYMM, NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY BAS_YYMM, ROLLUP(DATA_DTIL_CCD) ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC, DATA_DTIL_CCD)

SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CUST_CCD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN BAS_YYMM WHEN SUBSTR(CUST_CCD, 1, 1) = '2' OR BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE '합계' END AS BAS_YYMM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CUST_CCD, 2, 2) = '01' THEN '개인' WHEN SUBSTR(CUST_CCD, 2, 2) = '02' THEN '법인' ELSE CASE WHEN BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '계' END END AS CUST_NM , TRM_PERS_CNT , RRM_PERS_CNT , RRM_PERS_RAT , TRE_PERS_CNT , RRE_PERS_CNT , RRE_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM , CUST_CCD , SUM(TRM_PERS_CNT) AS TRM_PERS_CNT , SUM(RRM_PERS_CNT) AS RRM_PERS_CNT , TRUNC(CASE WHEN SUM(TRM_PERS_CNT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(RRM_PERS_CNT)/SUM(TRM_PERS_CNT)) END, 3) AS RRM_PERS_RAT , SUM(TRE_PERS_CNT) AS TRE_PERS_CNT , SUM(RRE_PERS_CNT) AS RRE_PERS_CNT , TRUNC(CASE WHEN SUM(TRE_PERS_CNT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(RRE_PERS_CNT)/SUM(TRE_PERS_CNT)) END, 3) AS RRE_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM , CUST_CCD , TRM_PERS_CNT , RRM_PERS_CNT , TRE_PERS_CNT , RRE_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT NIC65_T.BAS_YYMM , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY NIC65_T.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY NIC65_T.CUST_CCD) || NIC65_T.CUST_CCD AS CUST_CCD , MAX(NIC65_T.TRM_PERS_CNT) AS TRM_PERS_CNT , MAX(NIC65_T.TRE_PERS_CNT) AS TRE_PERS_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '02' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RRM_PERS_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = '03' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RRE_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT NIC65.BAS_YYMM , NIC65.CUST_CCD , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_CCD = '12' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TRM_PERS_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NIC65.DATA_CCD = '13' THEN NIC65.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TRE_PERS_CNT FROM NIC65B NIC65 WHERE 1 = 1 AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM >= #{fromDate } AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM <= #{toDate } AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND NIC65.DATA_CCD IN ('12','13') AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD })) GROUP BY NIC65.BAS_YYMM, NIC65.CUST_CCD) NIC65_T LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B NIC65 ON ( NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD IN ('02', '03') AND NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_T.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = NIC65_T.CUST_CCD AND (( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND NIC65.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD }))) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY NIC65_T.BAS_YYMM, NIC65_T.CUST_CCD)) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY BAS_YYMM, ROLLUP(CUST_CCD) ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC, CUST_CCD)

SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN C.BAS_YYMM WHEN SUBSTR(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 1, 1) IN ('2', '3') OR C.BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE 'Total' END AS BAS_YYMM ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '01' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'H') WHEN SUBSTR(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '02' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'M') WHEN SUBSTR(C.DATA_DTIL_CCD, 2, 2) = '03' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A004', 'L') ELSE CASE WHEN C.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE 'Total' END END AS DATA_DTIL_NM ,C.TN_PERS_CNT ,C.TR_PERS_CNT ,C.TD_PERS_CNT ,C.TF_PERS_CNT ,C.PN_PERS_CNT ,C.PR_PERS_CNT ,C.PD_PERS_CNT ,C.PF_PERS_CNT ,C.CN_PERS_CNT ,C.CR_PERS_CNT ,C.CD_PERS_CNT ,C.CF_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT B.BAS_YYMM ,B.DATA_DTIL_CCD ,SUM(B.TN_PERS_CNT) AS TN_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.TR_PERS_CNT) AS TR_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.TD_PERS_CNT) AS TD_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.TF_PERS_CNT) AS TF_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.PN_PERS_CNT) AS PN_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.PR_PERS_CNT) AS PR_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.PD_PERS_CNT) AS PD_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.PF_PERS_CNT) AS PF_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.CN_PERS_CNT) AS CN_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.CR_PERS_CNT) AS CR_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.CD_PERS_CNT) AS CD_PERS_CNT ,SUM(B.CF_PERS_CNT) AS CF_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY A.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY A.DATA_DTIL_CCD) || A.DATA_DTIL_CCD AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 전체 */ /* 신규 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '03' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '04' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TF_PERS_CNT /* 개인 */ /* 신규 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '01' AND A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '02' AND A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '03' AND A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '04' AND A.CUST_CCD = '01' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS PF_PERS_CNT /* 법인 */ /* 신규 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '01' AND A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CN_PERS_CNT /* 재이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '02' AND A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CR_PERS_CNT /* 지연이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '03' AND A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CD_PERS_CNT /* 선이행 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_TEX_CCD = '04' AND A.CUST_CCD = '02' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS CF_PERS_CNT FROM NIC65B A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BAS_YYMM >= #{fromDate } AND A.BAS_YYMM <= #{toDate } AND A.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND ( ( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND A.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7', '104') AND A.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM, A.DATA_DTIL_CCD ) B WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY B.BAS_YYMM, ROLLUP(B.DATA_DTIL_CCD) ORDER BY B.BAS_YYMM DESC, B.DATA_DTIL_CCD ) C

SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(F.CUST_CCD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN F.BAS_YYMM WHEN SUBSTR(F.CUST_CCD, 1, 1) = '2' OR F.BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE 'Total' END AS BAS_YYMM ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(F.CUST_CCD, 2, 2) IN ( '01', '02') THEN GET_CODE_NAME('M006', SUBSTR(F.CUST_CCD,3, 1) ) ELSE CASE WHEN F.BAS_YYMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '계' END END AS CUST_NM ,F.TRM_PERS_CNT ,F.RRM_PERS_CNT ,F.RRM_PERS_RAT ,F.TRE_PERS_CNT ,F.RRE_PERS_CNT ,F.RRE_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT E.BAS_YYMM ,E.CUST_CCD ,SUM(E.TRM_PERS_CNT) AS TRM_PERS_CNT ,SUM(E.RRM_PERS_CNT) AS RRM_PERS_CNT ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN SUM(E.TRM_PERS_CNT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(E.RRM_PERS_CNT) / SUM(E.TRM_PERS_CNT) ) END, 3) AS RRM_PERS_RAT ,SUM(E.TRE_PERS_CNT) AS TRE_PERS_CNT ,SUM(E.RRE_PERS_CNT) AS RRE_PERS_CNT ,TRUNC(CASE WHEN SUM(E.TRE_PERS_CNT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(E.RRE_PERS_CNT) / SUM(E.TRE_PERS_CNT) ) END, 3) AS RRE_PERS_RAT FROM ( SELECT D.BAS_YYMM ,D.CUST_CCD ,D.TRM_PERS_CNT ,D.RRM_PERS_CNT ,D.TRE_PERS_CNT ,D.RRE_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT B.BAS_YYMM ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY B.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY B.CUST_CCD) || B.CUST_CCD AS CUST_CCD ,MAX(B.TRM_PERS_CNT) AS TRM_PERS_CNT ,MAX(B.TRE_PERS_CNT) AS TRE_PERS_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN C.DATA_TEX_CCD = '02' THEN C.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RRM_PERS_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN C.DATA_TEX_CCD = '03' THEN C.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RRE_PERS_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.CUST_CCD ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_CCD = '12' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TRM_PERS_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.DATA_CCD = '13' THEN A.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TRE_PERS_CNT FROM NIC65B A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BAS_YYMM >= #{fromDate } AND A.BAS_YYMM <= #{toDate } AND A.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND A.DATA_CCD IN ('12','13') AND ( ( #{ROLE_ID} IN ('4', '5', '7') AND A.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND A.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM, A.CUST_CCD ) B LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC65B C ON ( C.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '03' AND C.DATA_TEX_CCD IN ('02', '03') AND C.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND C.CUST_CCD = B.CUST_CCD AND ( ( #{ROLE_ID } IN ('4', '5', '7') AND C.BRN_CD = '99999') OR ( #{ROLE_ID } NOT IN ('4', '5', '7') AND C.BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} ) ) ) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY B.BAS_YYMM, B.CUST_CCD ) D ) E WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY E.BAS_YYMM, ROLLUP(E.CUST_CCD) ORDER BY E.BAS_YYMM DESC, E.CUST_CCD ) F

/* TMS 보고 현황 - 거래일자 조회시 */ WITH BAS_YMD_LIST AS ( SELECT DECODE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD,'STR',B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'CTR',B.DL_DT) AS YMD FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','CTR') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND DECODE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD,'STR',B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'CTR',B.DL_DT) BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} GROUP BY DECODE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD,'STR',B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'CTR',B.DL_DT) ORDER BY DECODE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD,'STR',B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'CTR',B.DL_DT) DESC ) SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.YMD,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS YMD /* 추출일자 */ , NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0)+NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0) AS ALT_CNT_SUM /* 추출건수 - 계 */ , NVL(Y.RPT_CNT,0)+NVL(Z.RPT_CNT,0) AS RPT_CNT_SUM /* 보고건수 - 계 */ , DECODE(NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0)+NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0), 0, 0 , (NVL(Y.RPT_CNT,0)+NVL(Z.RPT_CNT,0))/(NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0)+NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0))) AS RPT_RT_SUM /* 보고율 - 계 */ , NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0) AS ALT_CNT_CTR /* 추출건수 - CTR */ , NVL(Y.RPT_CNT,0) AS RPT_CNT_CTR /* 보고건수 - CTR*/ , DECODE(NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0), 0, 0, NVL(Y.RPT_CNT,0)/NVL(Y.ALT_CNT,0)) AS RPT_RT_CTR /* 보고율 - CTR */ , NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0) AS ALT_CNT_STR /* 추출건수 - STR */ , NVL(Z.RPT_CNT,0) AS RPT_CNT_STR /* 보고건수 - STR*/ , DECODE(NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0), 0, 0, NVL(Z.RPT_CNT,0)/NVL(Z.ALT_CNT,0)) AS RPT_RT_STR /* 보고율 - STR */ FROM BAS_YMD_LIST X , ( SELECT B.DL_DT AS YMD , COUNT(*) AS ALT_CNT , COUNT(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1)) AS RPT_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} /* 추출일자 파라미터 */ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.DL_DT ) Y , ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS YMD , COUNT(*) AS ALT_CNT , COUNT(DECODE(RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1)) AS RPT_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} /* 추출일자 파라미터 */ AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) Z WHERE X.YMD = Y.YMD(+) AND X.YMD = Z.YMD(+) ORDER BY X.YMD DESC

/* TMS 보고 현황 - 거래년월 조회시 */ SELECT YMD /* 년월 */ , ALT_CNT_SUM-RPT_CNT_SUM AS ALT_CNT_SUM /* 추출건수 - 계 */ , RPT_CNT_SUM /* 보고건수 - 계 */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT_SUM-RPT_CNT_SUM, 0, 0, RPT_CNT_SUM/(ALT_CNT_SUM-RPT_CNT_SUM)) AS RPT_RT_SUM /* 보고율 - 계 */ , ALT_CNT_CTR-RPT_CNT_CTR AS ALT_CNT_CTR /* 추출건수 - CTR */ , RPT_CNT_CTR /* 보고건수 - CTR */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT_CTR-RPT_CNT_CTR, 0, 0, RPT_CNT_CTR/(ALT_CNT_CTR-RPT_CNT_CTR)) AS RPT_RT_CTR /* 보고율 - CTR */ , ALT_CNT_STR-RPT_CNT_STR AS ALT_CNT_STR /* 추출건수 - STR */ , RPT_CNT_STR /* 보고건수 - STR */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT_STR-RPT_CNT_STR, 0, 0, RPT_CNT_STR/(ALT_CNT_STR-RPT_CNT_STR)) AS RPT_RT_STR /* 보고율 - STR */ FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(YYYYMM,'YYYYMM'),'YYYY.MM') AS YMD /* 년월 */ , SUM(ALT_CNT) AS ALT_CNT_SUM /* 추출건수 - 계 */ , SUM(RPT_CNT) AS RPT_CNT_SUM /* 보고건수 - 계 */ , MAX(DECODE(DATA_CCD,'41',ALT_CNT,0)) AS ALT_CNT_CTR /* 추출건수 - CTR */ , MAX(DECODE(DATA_CCD,'41',RPT_CNT,0)) AS RPT_CNT_CTR /* 보고건수 - CTR */ , MAX(DECODE(DATA_CCD,'42',ALT_CNT,0)) AS ALT_CNT_STR /* 추출건수 - STR */ , MAX(DECODE(DATA_CCD,'42',RPT_CNT,0)) AS RPT_CNT_STR /* 보고건수 - STR */ FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM AS YYYYMM , DATA_CCD /* 41:CTR,42:STR */ , SUM(CNT) AS ALT_CNT , SUM(DECODE(DATA_DTIL_CCD,'42',CNT,0)) AS RPT_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC65B WHERE BAS_YYMM >= #{fromYear}||#{fromMonth} /* 년도와 월 파라미터 */ AND BAS_YYMM <= #{fromYear}||#{fromMonth} /* 년도와 월 파라미터 */ AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '04' /* TMS */ AND BRN_CD = '99999' GROUP BY BAS_YYMM, DATA_CCD ) GROUP BY YYYYMM ORDER BY YYYYMM DESC )

/* STR 룰별 적출 현황 - 분기별 */ SELECT RULE_ID /* 룰 ID */ , RULE_NM /* 룰 명 */ , ALT_CNT1-RPT_CNT1 AS ALT_CNT1 /* N분기 1번째 월의 추출건수 */ , RPT_CNT1 /* N분기 1번째 월의 보고건수 */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT1-RPT_CNT1, 0, 0, RPT_CNT1/(ALT_CNT1-RPT_CNT1)) AS RPT_RT1 /* N분기 1번째 월의 보고율 */ , ALT_CNT2-RPT_CNT2 AS ALT_CNT2 /* N분기 2번째 월의 추출건수 */ , RPT_CNT2 /* N분기 2번째 월의 보고건수 */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT2-RPT_CNT2, 0, 0, RPT_CNT2/(ALT_CNT2-RPT_CNT2)) AS RPT_RT2 /* N분기 2번째 월의 보고율 */ , ALT_CNT3-RPT_CNT3 AS ALT_CNT3 /* N분기 3번째 월의 추출건수 */ , RPT_CNT3 /* N분기 3번째 월의 보고건수 */ , DECODE(ALT_CNT3-RPT_CNT3, 0, 0, RPT_CNT3/(ALT_CNT3-RPT_CNT3)) AS RPT_RT3 /* N분기 3번째 월의 보고율 */ , RULE_NM_DESC FROM ( SELECT NVL(X.SSPS_TYP_CD,'합계') AS RULE_ID , NVL2(X.SSPS_TYP_CD, MAX(X.RULE_NM), '') AS RULE_NM , NVL2(X.SSPS_TYP_CD, MAX(X.RULE_NM_DESC), '') AS RULE_NM_DESC , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 1 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS ALT_CNT1 , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 1 AND Y.RPT_GB = 2 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RPT_CNT1 , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 2 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS ALT_CNT2 , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 2 AND Y.RPT_GB = 2 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RPT_CNT2 , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 3 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS ALT_CNT3 , SUM(CASE WHEN Y.MON_GB = 3 AND Y.RPT_GB = 2 THEN Y.CNT ELSE 0 END) AS RPT_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT B.MA01_6 AS SSPS_TYP_CD , A.BIZ_NM AS RULE_NM , A.BIZ_DESC AS RULE_NM_DESC FROM SSQ.C_BIZ A , SSQ.MMA010TB B WHERE A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_8 = 'S' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM C_PKG_BIZ_MAP AA , C_BIZ BB WHERE AA.BIZ_ID = A.BIZ_ID AND AA.PAR_BIZ_ID = BB.BIZ_ID AND BB.BIZ_NM LIKE '%' || CASE WHEN #{fromYear} < '2021' THEN '신규' ELSE '(구)' END || '%') UNION SELECT A.SCNR_ID AS SSPS_TYP_CD , A.SCNR_NM AS RULE_NM , '' AS RULE_NM_DESC FROM TMS_REQ A LEFT JOIN TMS_RUN_INFO B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID LEFT JOIN TMS_BZDM_MNG C ON A.BZDM_CD = C.BZDM_CD AND A.BIZ_CD = C.BIZ_CD WHERE 1=1 AND B.USE_YN ='Y' AND A.BZDM_CD = '02' AND A.SCNR_NM LIKE '%' || CASE WHEN #{fromYear} > '2021' THEN '신규' ELSE '(구)' END || '%' UNION SELECT 'KYC0' AS SSPS_TYP_CD , '수기 등록' AS RULE_NM , 'KYC0::수기 등록' RULE_NM_DESC FROM DUAL ) X , ( SELECT DATE_TEX_CCD AS SSPS_TYP_CD , BAS_YYMM AS YYYYMM , MAX(MOD(SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,-2)-1,3)+1) AS MON_GB , DECODE(DATA_DTIL_CCD,'42',2,1) AS RPT_GB , SUM(CNT) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC65B WHERE BAS_YYMM >= #{fromYear}||LPAD(3*#{fromQuart}-2,2,'0') /* 년도와 분기 파라미터 */ AND BAS_YYMM <= #{fromYear}||LPAD(3*#{fromQuart} ,2,'0') /* 년도와 분기 파라미터 */ AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '04' /* TMS */ AND DATA_CCD = '42' /* 41:CTR,42:STR */ AND BRN_CD = '99999' GROUP BY DATE_TEX_CCD, BAS_YYMM, DECODE(DATA_DTIL_CCD,'42',2,1) ) Y WHERE X.SSPS_TYP_CD = Y.SSPS_TYP_CD(+) GROUP BY ROLLUP (X.SSPS_TYP_CD) ORDER BY X.SSPS_TYP_CD NULLS FIRST )

SELECT E.INST_CCD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC58B E, WF_PROC_INSTANCE A, WF_PROC_INSTANCE D, WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B LEFT OUTER JOIN WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON ( C.WORK_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' AND B.WORK_ID=C.WORK_ID AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID=C.PERFORMER_ID) WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND ( (B.PERSON_YN='Y' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT N.DEP_ID || '.' || M.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE M, C_USER N WHERE M.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND M.USER_ID = N.USER_ID AND N.DEP_ID || '.' || M.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} ) ) ) AND A.PAR_INST_ID=D.INST_ID AND E.INST_ID=D.INST_ID AND E.SN_PRGRS_CCD IN ('1','2') GROUP BY E.INST_CCD
SELECT A.CNTNT, A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD='S093' AND A.USE_F ='Y'
SELECT A.CNTNT, A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.USE_F = 'Y' AND A.CD = #{cd} ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ

SELECT B.DEP_DESC AS DEP_CD ,B.DEP_TITLE AS DPRT_NM ,B.DEP_ID AS DEP_ID FROM C_MULTI_POSITION A ,C_DEP_INFO B WHERE A.CHRG_DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID AND A.CHRG_P_ID = #{CHRG_P_ID} AND A.TASK_DVCD = '2' --겸임 AND A.APPR_STAT_CD ='E' --승인 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT UNION ALL SELECT B.DEP_DESC AS DEP_CD ,B.DEP_TITLE AS DPRT_NM ,B.DEP_ID AS DEP_ID FROM C_MULTI_POSITION A ,C_DEP_INFO B WHERE A.TGT_DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID AND A.CHRG_P_ID = #{CHRG_P_ID} AND A.TASK_DVCD = '2' --겸임 AND A.APPR_STAT_CD ='E' --승인 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT
mapper.update: UPDATE C_USER C SET C.ACTIVE_YN = 'N' ,C.LAST_USE_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE C.LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(T.CNNT_TRY_DTTI), 'NO_DATE') AS CNNT_TRY_DTTI FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_SC T WHERE T.LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID} AND T.LOGIN_SUS_YN= 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.CS_NM ) AS NU ,A.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */ -- 실명번호(마스킹) ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_HIDDEN -- 실명번호(마스킹x) ,CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.CS_RGST_DT) ) > 0 AND LENGTH(TRIM(A.CS_RGST_DT) ) < 9 THEN SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,7,2) ELSE '' END AS CS_RGST_DT -- 생년월일(설립일자) ,A.CS_NM -- 한글고객명 ,A.ENG_CS_NM -- 영문고객명 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명확인구분코드 ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD -- 개인법인구분코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM -- 개인법인구분코드명 ,A.CS_NO FROM NIC01B A WHERE 1=1
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
AND A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND (A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')
) B WHERE 1=1
AND B.NU >= ( ( #{thisPage} - 1 ) * #{pageCount} + 1 ) AND B.NU <= ( #{thisPage} * #{pageCount} )

SELECT COUNT(A.RNMCNO /* 20250605 AML_CUST_ID */) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM NIC01B A WHERE 1=1
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
AND A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND (A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')

SELECT (A.TGT_DEP_ID ||'.'|| B.ROLE_ID) AS WF_GROUP_DEP_ROLE FROM C_MULTI_POSITION A, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE B WHERE A.TASK_DVCD ='2' --겸임 AND A.APPR_STAT_CD ='E' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.CHRG_P_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.CHRG_P_ID = #{USER_ID} UNION SELECT (A.DEP_ID ||'.'|| B.ROLE_ID) AS WF_GROUP_DEP_ROLE FROM C_USER A, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} UNION SELECT (C.DEP_ID ||'.'||B.ROLE_ID) AS WF_GROUP_DEP_ROLE FROM C_OFF_DUTY_USER A ,C_USER_GROUP_ROLE B ,C_USER C WHERE A.OFF_USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.OFF_USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.OFF_DUTY_START_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(NVL(A.OFF_DUTY_DUE_DT,A.OFF_DUTY_EXPECT_DT),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.DEL_YN ='N' AND A.AGENT_USER_ID = #{USER_ID}

SELECT NVL(LISTAGG(A.TITLE, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.START_TM),' ') AS STR_LIST FROM C_NOTI A WHERE A.ISSCROLL = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') BETWEEN A.START_TM AND A.END_TM
SELECT * FROM NIC93B A WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SCHEDULE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM NIC93B A WHERE A.JOB_ID = #{JOB_ID} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SCHEDULE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC93B A SET A.JOB_ST_CD = '8' WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SCHEDULE_YN = 'Y' AND A.JOB_ST_CD = '2'
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(M.WK_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(M.WK_DT, 5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(M.WK_DT, 7,2) AS WK_DT ,COUNT(*) AS TOTAL ,SUM(CASE WHEN M.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SC_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN M.COL_VAL != '정상' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ER_CNT FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG M WHERE M.WK_DT IN (SELECT MAX(N.WK_DT) FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG N) GROUP BY M.WK_DT

SELECT * FROM (SELECT B.CD ,B.CCD ,B.STND_CD_NM ,B.TBL_NM FROM NIC91B B ) A WHERE A.CD IN
#{CD_LIST, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.GRP_CD || A.ITM_CD AS CODE, A.ITM_NM AS NAME FROM (SELECT B.CD AS GRP_CD ,B.CNTNT AS ITM_CD ,B.CD_NM AS ITM_NM ,B.USE_F AS USE_YN FROM NIC92B B ) A WHERE A.GRP_CD = #{CD}
AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT /*AML.common.getComboData*/ A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME ,A.GRP_CD AS GRP_CODE FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD} AND A.USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ, A.CNTNT

SELECT B.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,D.DISPLAY_NM ,M.MENU_ACT_ID AS MENU_ACT_ID_1 ,P.DISPLAY_NM AS MENU_ACT_ID_NM_1 ,N.MENU_ACT_ID AS MENU_ACT_ID_2 ,Q.DISPLAY_NM AS MENU_ACT_ID_NM_2 ,N.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AS MENU_ACT_ID_3 ,R.DISPLAY_NM AS MENU_ACT_ID_NM_3 FROM C_MENU_ACT A INNER JOIN C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP B ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_WINDOW_ACT C ON B.WINDOW_ACT_ID = C.WINDOW_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_WINDOW_DISPLAY D ON C.WINDOW_ACT_ID = D.WINDOW_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH M ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = M.MENU_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH N ON M.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = N.MENU_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_MENU_DISPLAY P ON M.MENU_ACT_ID = P.MENU_ACT_ID AND M.MENU_ACT_ID != 'AML' AND P.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} INNER JOIN C_MENU_DISPLAY Q ON N.MENU_ACT_ID = Q.MENU_ACT_ID AND N.MENU_ACT_ID != 'AML' AND Q.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} INNER JOIN C_MENU_DISPLAY R ON N.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = R.MENU_ACT_ID AND N.MENU_ACT_ID != 'AML' AND R.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} WHERE D.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND C.WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID} AND M.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND M.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND N.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND N.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID}

SELECT A.BIZ_AUTH_YN ,B.GROUP_ID ,B.ROLE_ID ,B.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,B.USE_YN ,B.C ,B.R ,B.U ,B.D FROM C_WINDOW_ACT A LEFT JOIN C_AUTH_WINDOW_MAP B ON A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = B.WINDOW_ACT_ID AND B.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND B.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} WHERE A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}
SELECT A.GROUP_ID ,A.ROLE_ID ,A.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,A.USE_YN ,A.C ,A.R ,A.U ,A.D FROM C_AUTH_WINDOW_MAP A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND A.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}

SELECT A.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,A.BIZ_AUTH_YN ,A.SCREEN_TYPE_CD ,A.SCREEN_ID ,A.WINDOW_FORM_URL ,A.WINDOW_LOCATION_CD ,A.WINDOW_ITEM_YN ,A.WINDOW_DISPLAY_YN ,A.POPUP_YN ,A.WINDOW_ACT_DESC FROM C_WINDOW_ACT A WHERE A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}
SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD
SELECT A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD} AND A.USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ, A.CNTNT

SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT B.CNTNT AS CODE ,B.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = #{CD} AND B.USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY B.CD_RNK_SQ, B.CD_NM ) A UNION ALL SELECT D.TRNSFRM_CD AS CODE ,D.TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL AS NAME FROM NIC95B D WHERE D.CD = #{CD}

SELECT A.CD_ID AS CODE ,B.DISPLAY_NM AS NAME FROM C_CD A INNER JOIN C_CD_NM B ON A.CD_ID = B.CD_ID WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND A.CD_GRP_ID = #{CD_GRP_ID} ORDER BY A.DISPLAY_ORDER
SELECT A.GROUP_ID AS CODE ,B.GROUP_NM AS NAME FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH A INNER JOIN C_GROUP B ON A.GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID WHERE A.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} GROUP BY A.GROUP_ID, B.GROUP_NM
SELECT B.ROLE_ID AS CODE ,B.ROLE_NM AS NAME ,B.ROLE_DESC FROM C_ROLE B ORDER BY B.ROLE_DESC ASC
SELECT A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD} AND A.USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ, A.CNTNT

SELECT C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,B.MENU_ACT_ID ,A.DISPLAY_NM ,B.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,B.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,C.DISPLAY_ORDER ,E.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_MENU_DISPLAY A INNER JOIN C_MENU_ACT B ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_PKG_MENU_MAP C ON B.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID AND C.MENU_ACT_ID <> C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID INNER JOIN C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH D ON C.PKG_ID = D.PKG_ID AND D.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND D.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T.MENU_ACT_ID ORDER BY T.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN DESC, T.WINDOW_ACT_ID ASC) AS RN ,T.MENU_ACT_ID ,T.WINDOW_ACT_ID FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP T ) E ON E.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID AND E.RN = 1 WHERE D.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND D.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND D.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND D.ACCESS_YN = 'Y' AND A.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND B.MENU_DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.DISPLAY_ORDER

SELECT NVL(SUM(E.CTR_1),0) AS CTR_1 ,NVL(SUM(E.CTR_2),0) AS CTR_2 ,NVL(SUM(E.STR_1),0) AS STR_1 ,NVL(SUM(E.STR_2),0) AS STR_2 ,NVL(SUM(E.KYC_1),0) AS KYC_1 ,NVL(SUM(E.KYC_2),0) AS KYC_2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN (D.CRT='CTR') AND (D.BCD = '2') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS CTR_1 ,CASE WHEN (D.CRT='CTR') AND (D.BCD = '9') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS CTR_2 ,CASE WHEN (D.CRT='STR') AND (D.BCD = '2') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS STR_1 ,CASE WHEN (D.CRT='STR') AND (D.BCD = '9') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS STR_2 ,CASE WHEN (D.CRT='KYC') AND (D.BCD = '2') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS KYC_1 ,CASE WHEN (D.CRT='KYC') AND (D.BCD = '9') THEN D.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS KYC_2 FROM ( SELECT C.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD AS CRT ,C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS BCD ,COUNT(C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) AS BCD_COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD -- 혐의거래생성구분코드[STR/CTR] ,A.SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD -- 주거래지점코드 ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD -- 보고진행구분코드 FROM NIC66B A INNER JOIN NIC73B B ON A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT=B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID=B.SSPS_DL_ID WHERE B.MN_DL_BRN_CD = #{BDPT_CD} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL ) C GROUP BY C.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ) D ) E

SELECT NVL(SUM(C.CTR_1),0) AS CTR_1 ,NVL(SUM(C.CTR_2),0) AS CTR_2 ,NVL(SUM(C.STR_1),0) AS STR_1 ,NVL(SUM(C.STR_2),0) AS STR_2 ,NVL(SUM(C.KYC_1),0) AS KYC_1 ,NVL(SUM(C.KYC_2),0) AS KYC_2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN (B.CRT='CTR') AND (B.BCD = '2') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS CTR_1 ,CASE WHEN (B.CRT='CTR') AND (B.BCD = '9') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS CTR_2 ,CASE WHEN (B.CRT='STR') AND (B.BCD = '2') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS STR_1 ,CASE WHEN (B.CRT='STR') AND (B.BCD = '9') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS STR_2 ,CASE WHEN (B.CRT='KYC') AND (B.BCD = '2') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS KYC_1 ,CASE WHEN (B.CRT='KYC') AND (B.BCD = '9') THEN B.BCD_COUNT ELSE 0 END AS KYC_2 FROM ( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD AS CRT ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS BCD ,COUNT(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) AS BCD_COUNT FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ) B ) C
